sections.title: Fire Prevention Inspection Checklist Insp
sections.html:
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

INSPECTION CHECKLIST

Inspection frequency: Monthly (per 29 CFR 1926.150(c)(1) and WAC 296-155-260)

Item #

Inspection Item

Pass

Fail

N/A

Corrective Action Required

1

Are all fire extinguishers properly charged and inspected monthly? (per 29 CFR 1926.150(c)(1))

☐

☐

☐

2

Are fire extinguishers readily accessible and unobstructed? (per 29 CFR 1926.150(c)(1)(viii))

☐

☐

☐

3

Are 'No Smoking' signs posted in designated areas? (per 29 CFR 1926.151(a)(3))

☐

☐

☐

4

Are flammable liquids stored in approved containers and cabinets? (per 29 CFR 1926.152(a)(1))

☐

☐

☐

5

Is proper ventilation provided when handling flammable liquids? (per 29 CFR 1926.152(g)(3))

☐

☐

☐

6

Are ignition sources controlled in areas where flammable materials are present? (per 29 CFR 1926.151(b)(1))

☐

☐

☐

7

Are waste materials and debris properly disposed of to prevent fire hazards? (per 29 CFR 1926.25(c))

☐

☐

☐

8

Are temporary heating devices safely installed and maintained? (per 29 CFR 1926.154(a))

☐

☐

☐

9

Are fire brigades organized and trained if required? (per 29 CFR 1926.150(a)(5))

☐

☐

☐

10

Are fire alarms and communication systems functional? (per 29 CFR 1926.150(e))

☐

☐

☐

11

Are emergency exits clearly marked and unobstructed? (per WAC 296-155-260(2))

☐

☐

☐

12

Is hot work being performed with appropriate permits and fire watch? (per WAC 296-155-265(1))

☐

☐

☐

13

Are combustible materials stored away from heat sources? (per WAC 296-155-265(2))

☐

☐

☐

14

Are electrical cords and equipment in good condition and not overloaded? (per WAC 296-155-265(3))

☐

☐

☐

15

Are employees trained on fire prevention and emergency procedures? (per WAC 296-155-260(1))

☐

☐

☐

DEFICIENCY LOG
